reasoning: The CCCS CP-2: Contingency Plan control focuses on ensuring that contingency plans are in place for system recovery and continuity. In a Kubernetes context, this translates to ensuring that critical components such as etcd have backup configurations, audit logs are backed up, disaster recovery policies for pods and workloads are defined, and overall cluster backup and restore procedures are documented. These checks ensure that the Kubernetes environment can be restored and maintained in the event of a failure, aligning with the contingency plan requirements.
title: CCCS CP-2: Contingency Plan
